---
title: "Accessibility fixture"
format:
  revealjs:
    axe:
      output: json
    revealjs-plugins:
      - a11y
    revealjs-a11y:
      alt-text-warnings: false
---

## Text and links

A slide with a paragraph and a [labelled link](https://example.com).

- A first item.
- A second item.

## Language change {lang="fr"}

Un paragraphe en français pour vérifier l'annonce de changement de langue.

## Code

```r
x <- c(1, 2, 3)
```
